metadata.description: Claude generates, pm-skills critiques. The critic for PM docs in Claude Code: adversarial review at the core, framework-backed, anti-theater, with drafting modes that critique their own output.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Claude generates, pm-skills critiques. An adversarial review mode critiques any PM doc against curated frameworks, and the drafting modes run the same critique on their own output. Nine modes: teach, setup, brief, spec, stories, metrics, review, decide, discover. Verdicts are blunt: SLOP / ROUGH / SOLID / SHIP.
